title: Notice the relationship to part (a)
text: Parts (a) and (b) have A and C swapped. By anticommutativity, $$A C=-\left(C A\right)$$, so part $$(b)=-(part$$ $$a)=44i+17j-20k$$. You can verify with the determinant: i: $$(4)(1)-(10)(-4)=4+40=44$$. j: $$-[(3)(1)-(10)(2)]=-(-17)=17$$. k: $$(3)(-4)-(4)(2)=-12-8=-20$$.
